column1: # These alerts are expected for a local dev API without a full web server config

column3: Strict-Transport-Security header not set (HTTP in CI, HTTPS in prod via CloudFront)
Content Security Policy header not set (handled by CloudFront in production)
Server leaks version information (local Express server only, not exposed in prod)
X-Content-Type-Options header missing (local dev server, headers set at CDN layer)
X-Frame-Options header not set (SPA served via CloudFront which sets security headers)
